Subject: *EMCA* Mosquitoes
Message:
Ultraviolet high voltage traps work very well.  If the problem is severe put in more than one.  Place at least 20 feet away from the area you normally use and install in an elevated location.  Leave on 24 hours a day.

Harry Kirmon
